name: Chicken Nuggets (#1) (#2) (#3)
recipeIngredient: ½ cup fine dry bread crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Cut each half breast into 1 ½ inch cubes.
3. Combine bread crumbs, cheese, salt, spices, and place in a large zip lock bag.
4. Dip the chicken cubes into the melted butter, then coat with crumbs by placing them back into the bag.
5. Arrange the cubes in a single layer on an aluminum foil lined baking sheet.
6. Bake for 8-10 minutes.
7. Place frozen nuggets on baking trays and freeze for 30 minutes.
8. When ready to eat, remove from freezer and place on baking tray.
9. Cook at 400°F for 20-30 minutes, turning once during cooking.
